Face.Person.Result

类 ReadPersonDatabaseDetail_Result

  • java.lang.Object
    • Face.Person.Result.ReadPersonDatabaseDetail_Result
  • 所有已实现的接口:
    Door.Access.Command.INCommandResult

    public class ReadPersonDatabaseDetail_Result
extends java.lang.Object
implements Door.Access.Command.INCommandResult
